title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: The door's been left wide open now!!

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: Those who are cut by the "Master"...

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: Hmm? The lock on the door...

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: I hope they didn't hurt nami- San....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There's a pig growing on the wall.

dialogue.speaker: Hogback
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, are those zombies too?
